name: CleanInk OnCall
summary: On-call and incident management SaaS focused on clarity, escalation flows, and operational resilience.
description: CleanInk OnCall is a SaaS platform for managing alerts, rotations, and incident workflows. The focus is on predictable escalation paths, clear ownership, and reducing cognitive load during high-pressure events.

name: Vidyutor Reactor
summary: High-performance compute reactor in Rust for structured, concurrent workloads.
description: Vidyutor Reactor explores how to orchestrate concurrent, CPU-bound workloads in Rust with a focus on determinism, observability, and composable execution graphs.

name: Kolizeum API Gateway
summary: High-performance API gateway focused on routing, observability, and resilience.
description: Kolizeum is an API gateway experiment around structured routing, rate limiting, and observability. The goal is to treat traffic as a system to be shaped, not just forwarded.

name: LedgerMind
summary: Accounting automation SaaS exploring structured workflows and reconciliation logic.
description: LedgerMind is a SaaS concept around automating accounting flows, reconciliation, and reporting. The focus is on explicit invariants, auditability, and clear data flows.

name: NorthLedger
summary: AI-assisted financial analysis with structured prompts and explainable flows.
description: NorthLedger explores how AI can support financial analysis without becoming a black box. The focus is on structured prompts, explicit reasoning steps, and explainable outputs.
